title: Holloway & Fife
tagline: Bronze, brass, and patient repair work.
intro: A four-person shop on the south side of the canal, casting small architectural and decorative parts since 2016. Restoration runs, prop work, the occasional museum commission. Everything you see on this site is rendered from a folder of JSON files.

hero.alt: Workbench with bronze parts and tools

featuredWork.title: Restoration casting
featuredWork.summary: Pour-matched replacements for missing or broken bronze. Hardware, escutcheons, finials.

featuredWork.title: Pattern-making
featuredWork.summary: Wax and clay patterns cut from drawings, photographs, or rubbings — including missing-original work.

featuredWork.title: Commissions
featuredWork.summary: Small runs of bespoke parts — door pulls, drawer hardware, decorative fixings.

meta.description: Holloway & Fife — small bronze foundry. Restoration, pattern-making, commissions, repairs.
